$comment: Baseline: 'what's already in sync'. lastSyncedGitSha is the functional detection anchor (git diff <it>..HEAD); lastSyncedAt is audit-only. 'docs' holds per-file {noteId, repoHash, sliteHash}. SEED this after the bootstrap (set lastSyncedGitSha to the working-branch HEAD and fill repoHash/sliteHash per doc via `sync-detect.sh hash`). Start empty.
lastSyncedGitSha: <seed commit sha — set to working-branch HEAD after bootstrap>
